slides.title: Venture Studio — Interactive Workshop
slides.body:
Deck 02 is now an in-app interactive module.

Open Venture Studio from the Playbook Day 3 session. Squads work through five guided steps with coach feedback and an evidence library.

Facilitators: use “Open for projection” to display the squad workspace on screen.
slides.speakerNotes: Direct squads to Playbook → Day 3 → Enter Venture Studio. Use present mode for projection. 3 min orientation.
discussionQuestions: What evidence will your squad capture in the field today?
